steps.title: Use explanation and example
steps.content: The student wants to explain what Sonic Meditations is and give a specific example. The notes define it as a series of sound-based exercises with instructions, and they provide examples from individual meditations.

steps.title: Reject one-part responses
steps.content: B explains the work but gives no specific meditation as an example. C gives an example but does not explain what the work is. D compares two meditations without clearly explaining Sonic Meditations as a whole. The remaining choice does both required tasks. The answer is A.
